paper_authors: Thakkar N, Giesecke A, Bazalova O, Martinek J, Smykal V, Stanewsky R, Dolezel D

extraction_reasoning: Extracted from full text: 'K224D heterozygotes displayed a τ of ∼20 h at 18°C and lengthening of τ up to 22 h at higher temperatures (Q= 0.94)'. Individual fly period measurements shown in Figure 8C.

paper_authors: Griffith, M.K.; Minton, J.E.
source_context: Table 1, free-running rhythm under constant light (LL). Period duration at Qp_max averaged across 6 animals (Pigs A-F). ACTH measured by periodogram analysis from hourly plasma samples over 48 hours.
